---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research code and public outputs from the PySDM Seeding Lab"
lang: en
page-layout: article
---

## PySDM Seeding Lab

A research project exploring cloud microphysics and seeding problems through PySDM-based numerical experiments.

| Area | This blog | Code repository |
|---|---|---|
| Role | Questions, context, interpretation, and figures | Executable code, configurations, tests, and raw-data processing |
| Unit of change | One research note | One reproducible run |
| Connection | Records code versions and result links | Links back to related blog notes |

[Open the PySDM-Seeding-Lab repository](https://github.com/Jinu219/PySDM-Seeding-Lab){.btn .btn-primary}
